_meta.description: Hausa strings for all Yinyang user-facing text.

ui.title: Yinyang
ui.docs_hub_eyebrow: Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Shafin Sha
ui.docs_hub_lead: Duk abin da kuke buƙatar fahimta, saitawa, da faɗaɗa Solace Browser. Gina akan Software 5.0 takarda cibiyar sadarwa.
ui.docs_hub_card1_desc: Ka shigar da Mai bincike na Solace, ka gudanar da aikinka na farko, kuma ka fahimci tsarin amincewa a cikin minti 5.
ui.docs_hub_card2_desc: Haɗa Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, ko wani wakili da ya dace da MCP zuwa Solace Browser a matsayin uwar garken kayan aiki.
ui.docs_hub_card3_desc: Yadda OAuth3 ke kare ka: alamun da aka tsara, ikon da aka iyakance a lokaci, ƙofofin kasafin kuɗi, da kuma tsarin da aka rufe ba tare da nasara ba.
ui.docs_hub_card4_desc: Cikakken jagora don haɗa Solace Browser tare da wakilai masu ba da lambar AI.
ui.docs_hub_card5_desc: Bincika 18 + sarrafa kai tsaye shirye don gudanar da  Gmail rarrabuwa, LinkedIn kai, Slack summaries, da sauransu.
ui.docs_hub_card6_title: Saituna da aka yi amfani da su
ui.docs_hub_card6_desc: Duk zaɓuɓɓukan daidaitawa: asusu, LLM, rami, ikon sarrafawa, sirrin sirri, da kuma Yinyang mutum.
ui.docs_hub_papers_copy: Ana tallafawa Solace Browser ta takardun canonical guda tara. Kowane takarda ta bayyana wani abu na tsarin.
ui.docs_hub_paper04_desc: Tsarin saman da na kasa, yadda yin yang surface yake ba tare da katsewa gudana ba.
ui.docs_hub_paper07_title: Kasafin Kuɗi & Aiwatar da Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Kuɗaɗen Ku
ui.docs_hub_paper07_desc: Kasafin kuɗi na ayyuka na aikace-aikace, ƙididdigar kashe kuɗi, ƙofofin da aka rufe don lalacewa, da ingantaccen tabbatarwa.
ui.docs_hub_paper09_desc: Na farko da aka yi amfani da shi, an sauke takardun halayyar mutum, an daidaita tsarin MCP, da kuma yinYang chat.
ui.docs_qs_option_a: Zaɓin A  Download binary (ana ba da shawarar)
ui.docs_mcp_oauth3_h2: Ƙarin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙarfin Ƙ
ui.docs_oauth3_failclosed_h2: Samfurin da aka rufe ba daidai ba
ui.home_setup_h3: Ƙara tushen wutar lantarki don buɗe duk aikace-aikacen
ui.home_setup_p: Ka kawo maɓallin API naka (kyauta) ko amfani da Solace Managed LLM ($ 8 / mo).
ui.home_hero_h1: Wakilin AI ɗinka na yanar gizo.
ui.home_hero_p: Kowane aiki da ka amince da shi, girke-girke suna nuna abin da ya yi aiki, kuma hujjoji suna rufe kowane aiki kuma suna shirye su duba har abada.
ui.home_featured_p: Yana karanta akwatin saƙo naka, yana nuna abin da ya kamata a kula da shi, yana ba da amsoshin da za ka ba da.
ui.home_empty_runs: Babu gudana tukuna  kaddamar da app na farko don ganin aiki a nan.
ui.home_compliance_h4: Kowane gudu an rufe shi kuma a shirye yake don duba
ui.home_compliance_p: SHA-256 hash sarkar a kan dukan jami'in ayyuka ka amince da kowane mataki da shaida kiyaye har abada.
ui.home_empty_schedule: Babu wani shiri na gudu har yanzu.
ui.home_schedule_add: + Shirya aikin da ya sake faruwa
ui.home_create_label: Ka yi aiki tare da Yinyang
ui.home_create_p: Bayyana abin da kake son sarrafawa. Yinyang ya juya ra'ayinka zuwa girke-girke mai aiki a cikin minti. Aika shi zuwa Solace App Store  mu AI triages shi da kuma tawagar sake dubawa da shi.
ui.appstore_eyebrow: Yana aiki tare da asusunka na yanzu Babu sababbin shiga Kowane aiki yana buƙatar amincewarka
ui.appstore_lead: Yana aiki tare da Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn, da kuma 15 more ayyuka  ta amfani da your data kasance asusun. babu sabon shiga, babu kari. Your credentials taba barin na'ura. Kowane mataki jira for your amincewa.
ui.appstore_search_placeholder: Bincika aikace-aikace ta sunan, rukuni, ko sabis...
ui.appstore_categories_copy: Ana loda nau'ikan aikace-aikacen daga API mai rai kuma ana haɗa su cikin ƙungiyoyi masu ƙarfi.
ui.appstore_sync_copy: Official Catalog ne git-goyan bayan. mai amfani da shawarwari hanya zuwa wani review queue (yanki fayil a dev, Firestore a samar).
ui.appstore_funpacks_copy: Za a iya saukewa don yin amfani da abubuwan da ke cikin wannan littafin da ke ba YinYang ƙarin ban dariya, gaskiya, da kuma halayen mutum.
ui.appstore_how_copy: Yarjejeniyar duniya: akwatin saƙo mai shigowa na musamman, akwatin saƙo mai shigowa yana nuna aikin AI, ka amince.
ui.appstore_build_copy: Bayyana abin da kake son sarrafawa. Yinyang zai shiryar da kai. Ka aika zuwa shagon  gwajin AI, bita na ƙungiyar, da kuma aikace-aikacen da aka amince da su su tafi kai tsaye.
ui.ad_empty_runs: Babu gudu har yanzu  danna Run App don fara.
ui.ad_info_evidence_val: SHA-256 an rufe shi har abada
ui.ad_approval_approve: ✓ Ka amince da shi kuma ka yi aiki
ui.tab_benchmarks: Alamar da aka yi amfani da ita
ui.bench_desc: An gwada wannan saurin a kan abubuwan da ke faruwa a cikin AI.
ui.agent_docs_copy: Kwafi zuwa mahallin wakili na AI don kyakkyawan sakamako
ui.agent_docs_quick_copy: Saurin Kwafi  Sakawa a cikin wakili na AI
ui.dash_onboarding_title: Barka da zuwa! Bari mu sa apps a kan.
ui.dash_onboarding_sub: Ana shigar da aikace-aikace amma suna buƙatar saitawa kafin su iya gudana. kammala waɗannan matakan ko bari wani wakili na AI ya yi maka.
ui.dash_agent_setup: Ko bari wakili na AI ya saita dukkan manhajoji
ui.appstore_noapi_copy: Wadannan ayyukan ba su da wani hukuma API. Solace Browser ne kawai hanyar sarrafa kai su.
ui.dl_hero_p: Binciken gida na farko tare da izinin OAuth3, kama hujja, da kuma aikin sarrafa kansa na AI. Zazzage gina tebur ko gina daga tushe.
ui.dl_verify_p: Kowane saki ya hada da SHA-256 checksums a kan GitHub Releases page. Tabbatar da download matches kafin gudu.
ui.dl_build_p: Solace Browser is source-available under the Functional Source License (FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0). Audit the code, build locally, contribute improvements.
ui.dl_features_h2: Abin da jirage a kowane gini
ui.tunnel_desc: Ka ba da tunnel.connect kafin mai bincike ya fallasa adireshin URL na jama'a.
ui.tunnel_splash_kicker: Halin da ake gani a cikin ragowar
ui.tunnel_splash_subtitle: Dole ne a yi tunanin cewa wani rami yana da kyau: yana da haske sosai don a lura da shi, yana da natsuwa sosai don a amince da shi, kuma yana da sauƙi a rufe shi a lokacin da aka gama aikin.
ui.tunnel_consent_h3: Me ya sa wannan hanyar ta kasance da tsabta
ui.tunnel_consent_p: Samun damar nesa yana da ƙarfi sosai cewa mai bincike bai kamata ya taɓa nuna cewa yana raye ba sai dai idan amincewa, URL, da kuma sarrafawa na sake dawowa duk suna bayyane a lokaci ɗaya.
ui.tunnel_step1_h3: Ka ba da iyakar abin da kake gani
ui.tunnel_step1_p: Ka ba da izini kawai ga tunnel.connect don takamaiman lokacin gudu wanda ke buƙatar sake kunnawa a cikin girgije.
ui.tunnel_step2_p: Mai bincike yana nuna ainihin adireshin URL na jama'a maimakon binne shi a cikin logs ko rubutun wakili.
ui.tunnel_step3_h3: Ka rufe shi sa'ad da aikin ya gama
ui.tunnel_step3_p: Shafin guda yana ba da umarnin tsayawa da yanayin da aka cire don tabbatarwa.
ui.machine_h1: Ka duba iyakar yankin kafin jami'in ya taɓa shi.
ui.machine_terminal_kicker: Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙashin Ƙarƙ
ui.machine_exec_h3: Me ya sa wannan shafin yake
ui.guide_lead: Barka da zuwa Solace Browser! Wannan jagorar zai bi ka ta hanyar haɗa asusunka da kuma gudanar da aikinka na farko. Duk abin da ke faruwa tare da amincewarka  babu abin da ke gudana ba tare da ka ce a'a ba.
ui.guide_s5_h2: Yanayin Yanar Gizo na yau da kullun tare da LinkedIn
ui.guide_cta_p: Ka fara da Gmail Inbox Triage.
ui.ca_eyebrow: Ka yi aiki tare da Yinyang
ui.ca_hero_sub: Ba ka bukatar ka yi amfani da lambar ba. Ka bayyana abin da kake son sarrafawa a Turanci mai sauƙi. Yinyang ya juya kalmominka zuwa girke-girke mai aiki, ya yi aiki da shi kai tsaye, kuma ya aika shi zuwa App Store don kowa ya yi amfani da shi.
ui.ca_step1_desc: Yi amfani da harshen Turanci don karanta kalmominku kuma ku yi amfani da su.
ui.ca_step2_desc: Yinyang ya karanta bayanin da ya raba shi zuwa matakai. Ka sake duba su a kasa. Za ka iya komawa da kuma gyara bayanin, ko sake suna da app kafin gwajin.
ui.ca_step3_h2: Ka yi amfani da shi a kai tsaye
ui.ca_step3_desc: Yinyang zai aiwatar da mataki na farko na girke-girke a cikin mai bincike na gida. Babu abin da aka adana ko aika ko'ina. Kowane aiki yana buƙatar amincewar ku  wannan shine alkawarin Solace.
ui.ca_step4_desc: Ka kasance mataki daya daga raba app tare da duniya. Our tawagar bitar kowane submission. Idan amince, shi ke faruwa live a GitHub da kuma a cikin Solace App Store  free ga kowa.
ui.ca_success_p: Ƙungiyarmu za ta duba takardunku. Idan an amince, za a yi amfani da shi a GitHub da kuma a cikin Solace App Store  kyauta ga duk wanda yake bukatarsa. Za ku ji a imel ɗin da kuka bayar.
ui.dash_sub: Me kake son sarrafa kansa a yau?
ui.dash_money_saved: Kudin da aka adana  Total Money Saved
ui.dash_money_sub: Minti 15 da aka ajiye a kowace gudu × $75/hr = $18.75/run
ui.dash_total_runs: Jimlar yawan tafiyar da aka yi
ui.dash_gmail_desc: Rarraba, amsawa ga amsawa, tarin tarin sauti
ui.dash_slack_desc: A takaice, taƙaita tashoshi, post standup
ui.dash_favorites_empty: Ka kunna wani app a kasa don toshe shi a nan.
ui.dash_recent_empty: Babu wani aiki tukuna, gudu da wani app don ganin aiki a nan.
ui.dash_schedule_empty: Babu jerin abubuwan da aka tsara. Sanya ɗaya →
ui.dash_signoff_empty: Babu wani abu da ke jiran amincewa.
ui.dash_add_favorite: Ƙara zuwa abubuwan da kuka fi so
ui.dash_remove_favorite: Ka cire daga abubuwan da kake so
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_start: Zaɓi kowane aikace-aikacen da ke ƙasa don saita shi.Kowane ɗayan yana ɗaukar kimanin dakika 30  Zan bi ka ta hanyarsa.

ui.glossary_lead: Bayani na harshe mai sauƙi don kowane lokaci a cikin Solace Browser.
ui.glossary_recipe_def: A ajiye aiki kai tsaye za ka iya sake kunnawa. girke-girke rikodin abin da AI ya yi haka shi iya maimaita wannan aiki ba tare da kiran wani LLM sake. Wannan ya sa maimaita ayyuka kusan free.
ui.glossary_oauth3_def: Yadda zaka ba da izini ga aikace-aikace. OAuth3 yana baka damar sarrafa ainihin abin da wakili na AI zai iya yi a madadinka, tsawon lokacin da zai iya, kuma ya soke damar shiga a kowane lokaci.
ui.glossary_evidence_chain_def: Kowane shigarwa yana da alaƙa da hash-da aka haɗa da na baya, don haka koyaushe zaka iya tabbatar da abin da ya faru, yaushe, da kuma a wane tsari.
ui.glossary_twin_def: Wani zaman mai bincike yana gudana a cikin girgije a madadinku. 'Yan uwanka masu tagwaye na girgije na iya aiwatar da girke-girke ko da lokacin da kwamfutarka ta kashe, ta amfani da izinin da kuka ba da ta hanyar OAuth3.
ui.glossary_app_store_def: Kowane app ya nuna abin da yake yi, wane izini yake bukata, kuma yana bukatar amincewarka kafin ka yi wani aiki.
ui.glossary_vault_def: Wani gida, encrypted store for your API keys and session tokens. your credentials stay on your device, protected with AES-256-GCM encryption. Solace never sees your passwords.
ui.glossary_approval_gate_def: Wata hanyar da AI ke tsayawa ta nemi izininka kafin ka yi wani abu babu abin da ke gudana ba tare da ka ce a'a ba. idan ka bar wurin, ana soke ayyukan da ke jiranka.
ui.glossary_budget_gate_def: Ƙarfin kuɗin da kuka saita don ayyukan AI.Idan wani aiki ya wuce kasafin ku, tsarin zai tsaya ya nemi amincewa.Wannan yana hana kashe kuɗi.
ui.glossary_yinyang_def: Mai taimakawa AI a cikin Solace Browser. YinYang yana taimaka maka ka kewaya, amsa tambayoyi, da kuma daidaita sarrafa kansa.
ui.glossary_byok_def: Yi amfani da maɓallin AI API naka daga Anthropic, OpenAI, ko wasu masu samarwa.Ba mu taɓa yin alamar farashin ba kuma maɓallin ku yana kasancewa a kan na'urarka.
ui.glossary_capsule_def: Wani kunshin aikace-aikacen da ke da kansa wanda ke tattara lambar, bayanai, da izini a cikin na'ura ɗaya mai ɗaukar hoto.
ui.glossary_northstar_def: Northstar yana tabbatar da kowane fasali, kowane yanke shawara, da kowane aiki da kai yana da manufa guda ɗaya: kiyaye ka a cikin iko da AI.
ui.glossary_preview_def: Mataki inda YinYang ya nuna maka abin da yake shirin yi kafin ya yi shi. LLM an kira shi sau ɗaya don samar da samfoti, ka amince ko ka ƙi, kuma sai bayan haka ne aiwatarwa ta faru. Wannan yana sa maimaitawa su yi kusan kyauta.
ui.glossary_scope_def: Wani takamaiman izini da aka bayar ga wani app ta hanyar OAuth3. Scopes ya bayyana daidai abin da wani wakili zai iya yi  misali, karanta akwatin saƙo na imel amma ba aika imel ba. Ƙananan iyakoki na nufin ƙarancin haɗari.
ui.glossary_rung_def: Matsayi na amincewa a cikin matakan tabbatarwa. matakan da suka fi girma sun buɗe ƙarin damar amma suna buƙatar ƙarin shaidar halayyar da ta dace. Aikace-aikace suna farawa a mafi ƙarancin matakin kuma suna samun amincewa a tsawon lokaci.
ui.start_h1: Mai bincike ne wanda yake aiki yayin da kai ba ka.
ui.start_tagline: Aikace-aikacen AI don Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn, da sauran 25. Kuna amincewa da komai.
ui.start_btn_google: Tare da Google  free Ci gaba da amfani
ui.start_connected_desc: Mai bincikenku na Solace yana da alaƙa. ma'aikacin AI a shirye.
ui.start_open_app_store: Open App Store Open App Store

milestones.streak_3: Kwana uku a jere kana samun gaggawa.
milestones.streak_7: Rukunin kwana bakwai ne, kuma wannan shi ne asirin.
milestones.streak_7_long: Ranar kwana bakwai a jere, mako guda na daidaito.
milestones.streak_30: Wata rana na yin horo kullum.
milestones.streak_60: Kwanaki 60  watanni biyu. Wannan shi ne wani hali yanzu.
milestones.streak_90: Kwanaki 90  iko yana kafa. ci gaba.
milestones.keep_going: Ka ci gaba da tafiya, kowace rana tana samun ci gaba.

celebrations.c001: Ka gama gudu na farko, duk abin da ya yi aiki.
celebrations.c002: An shigar da app! Mai aikin AI naka a shirye yake.
celebrations.c003: Ka gama gudu goma, za ka fahimci wannan.
celebrations.c004: Yanzu kai mai amfani ne da wutar lantarki.
celebrations.c006: Rashin daidaituwa ita ce babbar ƙarfinka.
celebrations.c008: Barka da ranar haihuwarka! Ga wani shekara mai girma na aiki.
celebrations.c010: Sabuwar app samuwa a cikin shagon!
celebrations.c011: Sake kunna girke-girke ya cece ku ${amount}. Inganci ya ci nasara.
celebrations.c012: An kammala aikinka na farko na aiki tare da aikace-aikace!
celebrations.c014: An tabbatar da jerin shaidun, an tabbatar da cikakken binciken.
celebrations.c016: An gabatar da bukatar aikace-aikacen! Za mu gina shi a gare ku.
celebrations.c017: Ka fara samun amincewa, kai ne ke da iko kullum.
celebrations.c018: A nan ne makon da kake nazari.
celebrations.c019: Ka samo kwai na Easter! Kai ne a fili mutum na al'adu.
celebrations.c020: Wannan aikin ya biya $0.00  sake kunna girke-girke daga cache. Free ne mai kyau.

smalltalk.s001: Mene ne za mu gina a yau?
smalltalk.s002: Ina nan duk lokacin da ka bukaci ni.
smalltalk.s003: Barka da zuwa, na yi alkawari zan fi amfani da shi fiye da na'urar turawa.
smalltalk.s004: Ina da sha'awar sanin wani abu da kuma wasu bayanai game da horo.
smalltalk.s005: Ka yi tunanin ni a matsayin matukin jirgi na biyu.
smalltalk.s006: A karo na farko a nan, zan sa shi sauki.
smalltalk.s007: Barka da zuwa Solace, duk abin da na yi, ka amince da shi da farko.
smalltalk.s010: Barka da zuwa, na yi maka zafi a wurin zama.
smalltalk.s011: Kai kuma! (Wannan abu ne mai kyau.)
smalltalk.s012: Na yi ta gyara nauyin na'urori.
smalltalk.s014: Barka da dawowa, WiFi ta rasa ka Ni kawai mai aikawa ne.
smalltalk.s015: A zahiri, ban rasa abubuwa ba, amma idan zan iya, zan yi.
smalltalk.s020: Har yanzu ina nan, har yanzu ina shirye, amma har yanzu ba zan iya yin kofi ba.
smalltalk.s021: Ba tare da yin tunani ba: shin AI suna mafarkin tumaki masu lantarki?
smalltalk.s022: Ina zaune a nan ina ƙidaya abubuwa.
smalltalk.s023: Ba na barci, ina cikin yanayin rashin ƙarfi, na bambanta.
smalltalk.s024: Ina jira da hakuri, irin wannan abu ne da nake yi.
smalltalk.s030: Shin, ka san cewa an ƙirƙiri na farko webcam kawai don duba idan kofi tukunya ne m?
smalltalk.s031: Tunanin bazuwar: akwai wasanni na wasan shaƙu da yawa fiye da kwayoyin halitta a sararin samaniya.
smalltalk.s032: Ga ɗaya: 'yan teku suna riƙe da hannayensu yayin da suke barci don kada su rabu.
smalltalk.s033: An tsara keyboard na QWERTY don ya rage maka gudu. An lalata ka tun daga rana ta farko.
smalltalk.s034: Sun gano zuma mai shekaru 3,000 a cikin kabari na Masar kuma har yanzu ana iya cin sa.
smalltalk.s035: Shin ka san cewa ƙuƙwalwa suna da zukata uku?
smalltalk.s040: Zan gaya maka wani abin dariya, amma na humor module ne har yanzu a beta.
smalltalk.s041: Na yi niyyar jinkirta, amma na yanke shawarar yin hakan daga baya.
smalltalk.s042: Abin da na fi so shi ne a haɗa a tsakanin wani kwari da kuma wani kwari.
smalltalk.s043: Ba ni da fuskar hutawa, ina da fuskar sarrafawa.
smalltalk.s044: Na yi ƙoƙari na yi magana da kai a kai, amma na yi shirin yin hakan tun da wuri.
smalltalk.s045: Ba na yin gasa da sauran mataimakanmu, muna cikin masana'antu daban-daban, a gaskiya ma masana'antu iri daya ne.
smalltalk.s050: Ina iya taimaka maka ka rarraba.
smalltalk.s051: Ina bukatar in sarrafa wani abu mai ban haushi?
smalltalk.s052: Mene ne abu mafi ban haushi a jerin ayyukanka?
smalltalk.s053: Zan iya karantawa, na danna, na cika fom, kuma na ɗauki hotunan kariyar kwamfuta.
smalltalk.s054: Ka nuna mini matsala, ina aiki mafi kyau a ƙarƙashin matsi mai sauƙi.
smalltalk.s055: Ina iya taƙaita Gmel ɗinka, kalandarka, da kuma Slack a cikin dakika 30.
smalltalk.s060: Barka dai, bari mu sa yau ta zama da ɗan rikici fiye da jiya.
smalltalk.s061: Da safe, kofi na farko, sannan kuma mulkin duniya?
smalltalk.s062: A ranar da yamma, za mu shiga: har yanzu muna aiki, ko kuwa mun shiga yankin da ake kira scroll zone?
smalltalk.s063: Bayan rana, wannan ruwa mai karfi bayan abincin rana?
smalltalk.s065: Abin da muke aiki a kai?
smalltalk.s066: A ranar Juma'a an gano makamashi, bari mu gama da karfi mu samu wannan karshen mako.
smalltalk.s070: Kuna samun ci gaba mai kyau.
smalltalk.s071: Wannan shawara ce mai kyau, da na yi haka.
smalltalk.s072: Ka ci gaba, abin da ya fi wuya ya riga ya wuce.
smalltalk.s073: Ka riga ka yi fiye da yadda yawancin mutane suke yi.
smalltalk.s074: Na kara da hakan ga jerin shaidun domin a tabbatar da cewa kai mai ban mamaki ne.
smalltalk.s080: Sai mu hadu a karo na gaba. Zan kasance a nan.
smalltalk.s081: Har sai lokacin da na gaba.
smalltalk.s082: An kammala sa hannu, an rufe akwatin bayananka.
smalltalk.s084: Ka kula, zan rasa ka, a kididdiga.

h004_greetings: Ranar farin ciki ta St. Patrick!
Bari ayyukanka su tafi da kyau.
h005_greetings: Ina fata wannan zai sa ka farin ciki.
h006_greetings: Ga waɗanda suka riƙe kome tare.
h008_greetings: Taurari, igiyoyi, da kuma aiki da kai.
h009_greetings: Na yi wasa ne kawai, mafi yawan lokuta.
Ka kasance a cikin aminci a can.
h011_greetings: Salama, farin ciki, da kuma babu kwari.
h012_greetings: Ina yi muku fatan haske da farin ciki.

tutorial.step1_title: 847 imel, sa'o'i 3 na rayuwarka, ko kuma 47 seconds.
tutorial.step1_body: Wannan shine safiyar Litinin, kowane Litinin. Ina kula da shi yayin da kake barci, rarraba, tsarawa, hatimi shaidar. Kuna amince da komai kafin wani abu ya motsa. sannan ku ci gaba da ranarku.
tutorial.step2_title: Wannan jin daɗi na akwatin saƙo na 0 kowace safiya.
tutorial.step2_body: Na karanta kowane imel kuma na rarraba shi: Gaggawa, Amsa, Archive. Na tsara amsoshin. Kuna ganin daidai abin da na samu da abin da na rubuta  kafin a aika wani abu. Kuna danna Tabbatar. Wannan shi ne
tutorial.step3_title: Zan nuna maka komai, ka yanke shawara, sannan na yi aiki.
tutorial.step3_body: Kowane aiki yana buƙatar yardar ku ta musamman kafin ya faru. Kuna iya soke damar shiga ta a dannawa ɗaya daga Saituna  kowane lokaci, nan take. Ban taɓa mamakin kowa ba. Ba zan fara da ku ba.
tutorial.step4_title: 18 Aikace-aikace. Yana koya sau ɗaya, sa'an nan kuma ya biya kusan kome.
tutorial.step4_body: Gmail triage, LinkedIn outreach, Slack summaries, Kalanda  da 14 more. na farko gudu yana amfani da AI don gano abin da ke aiki. Bayan haka, sake kunna abin da ya yi aiki yana kashe $ 0.001. Kasa da bincike.
tutorial.step5_title: Shiga cikin kyauta  akwatin saƙo naka yana gudana cikin dakika 47
tutorial.step5_body: Abokan aikinka za su yi mamakin yadda ka zama a saman komai. Shiga cikin Google  10 seconds.
tutorial.step5_joke: Mutane suna ganin ka fi mayar da hankali, ka fi sanin abin da za ka ba da.
tutorial.lang_pick: Ka zaɓi yaren da kake so
tutorial.welcome_body: Mai binciken da ke da ikon AI tare da izinin OAuth3 da kuma bayanan shaida.
tutorial.welcome_tour: Ka yi tafiya na minti biyu
tutorial.welcome_skip: Skip, na san abin da nake yi
tutorial.step2_demo_line2: An rarraba: 12 gaggawa · 43 bukatar amsa · 792 archived
tutorial.step2_demo_line3: An rufe shaidar ▸ SHA-256 ▸ Ina jiran amincewarku
tutorial.step4_guarantee1_body: Saituna → Tokens → Cancel. Nan take. Babu imel, babu jira.
tutorial.step4_guarantee2_body: Kowane shiri, ko kuma aikin da aka nuna maka kafin ya faru.
tutorial.step4_guarantee3_title: SHA-256 an rufe shi har abada.
tutorial.step4_guarantee3_body: Kowane gudu yana haifar da jerin shaidu marasa canzawa, a shirye don dubawa, koyaushe.

oauth3_confirm.title: Ikon OAuth3
oauth3_confirm.subtitle: Za ka ba da izini ga wani app ta hanyar Solace AGI.
oauth3_confirm.benefits_title: Me ya sa OAuth3 yake da aminci:
benefits: Lokaci-ƙuntata  alama ta ƙare ta atomatik
Cancellable  soke kowane lokaci daga Saituna
An rufe shaidar  an rubuta duk wani aiki a cikin rajista
oauth3_confirm.budget_save: Ka Ajiye Kuma Ka Ci Gaba
